title: centaurea × semiaustriaca
intro: Centaurea × semiaustriaca, also known as mountain cornflower, is a hybrid plant species within the Centaurea genus, characterized by its vibrant purple flowers and drought-tolerant properties. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Centaurea × semiaustriaca include its ability to reduce pain, improve sleep, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Centaurea × semiaustriaca can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
